generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR capturing 3D point clouds for object detection and tracking in the autonomous vehicle environment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing RGB-D data for environmental perception and object detection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawRGBDData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring ego vehicle speed integrated into the lower-level chassis architecture."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle integrated into the lower-level chassis architecture."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data stream from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR transmitted via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi/UDP with ≤100ms latency."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance RawRGBDData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw RGB-D data stream from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera transmitted via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi/UDP with ≤100ms latency."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data collected from onboard sensors and transmitted via ROS2 middleware with ≤100ms latency."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Steering angle data collected from onboard sensors and transmitted via ROS2 middleware with ≤100ms latency."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm implemented in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE for processing raw LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering algorithm implemented in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE for object tracking from processed point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Performance Class I Adaptive Cruise Control logic implemented in ACC Controlling FE."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicEnabler
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data derived from raw LiDAR and camera data using DBSCAN and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudData, RawRGBDData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler, DataStorageEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle collected via Data Collecting FE."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed sensor data stream including LiDAR, camera, and vehicle state data before alignment and serialization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudData, RawRGBDData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking using Python 3.8 and C++."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService, DataStorageService
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing FE handling raw sensor fusion, alignment, unit conversion, and serialization via custom Data Translation FE."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataStorageService
]

instance ControlLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC Controlling FE implementing ISO 15622 Performance Class I logic with computation offloading to external hardware."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database component aggregating object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Visualization UI rendering vehicle, environment, and projected path using ROS2 RViz or custom OpenGL-based renderers."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware managing intra-vehicle communication and modular software components across Python, C++, and MATLAB/Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataPreProcessingService, ObjectTrackingService
]

instance Jetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK enabling hardware acceleration for Jetson Orin Nano and NX antenna operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService, ObjectTrackingService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time collection of ego vehicle state and object tracks from physical twin with ≤100ms latency compliance."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processing of raw sensor data into clustered and tracked objects using DBSCAN and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handling raw sensor fusion, alignment, unit conversion, and serialization via custom Data Translation FE."
    DTDFVocab:provides RawSensorData
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implementation of ISO 15622 Performance Class I ACC logic with computation offloading to external hardware."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, DrivingPathInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control of ACC (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking) via Control Panel interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregation and storage of object tracks and vehicle state data in SQL database for reporting."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state data."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle speed and steering angle for operational awareness."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks derived from LiDAR and camera data for environmental perception."
]

instance DrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of projected driving path based on ACC control logic and object tracking."
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics of ACC control logic including fuel economy and driving stability improvements."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stored timeseries data of object tracks and vehicle state for post-analysis and reporting."
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters including desired speed and control mode selection."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate emergency braking triggered via remote control or automatic collision avoidance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for vehicle propulsion."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism controlling steering angle integrated into the lower-level chassis architecture."
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting Data Pre-Processing FE, Actuation FE, and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE on Jetson Orin Nano."
    base:contains VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator, DataPreProcessingEnabler, PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosting Data Collection FE, ACC Controlling FE, Reporting FE, and Data Storage on external hardware."
    base:contains DataCollectionService, ACCControlService, ReportGenerationService, DataStorageEnabler, ControlLogicEnabler
]

instance UserInterfaceEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity hosting 3D Visualization and Control Panel components for operator interaction."
    base:contains VisualizationEnabler, RemoteManagementService
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle environment with two-layer chassis architecture and ROS2 middleware integration."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserInterfaceEntity, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
    - **Desired Speed Commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** (Digital Twin Entity) and transmitted back to the PT via the **Actuation FE** (Physical Twin Entity). These commands are converted into motor voltage signals by the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**.
    - **Remote Management Commands**: Sent from the **Control Panel** (User Entity) to the **Actuation FE** for **enabling/disabling ACC**, **modifying desired speed**, or **emergency braking**. These commands are serialized and transmitted via the **Data Translation FE** over **Wi-Fi/UDP** with ≤100 ms latency (per **R7**).
    - **Actuation Feedback**: The PT confirms execution of commands (e.g., motor voltage application) back to the DT for closed-loop validation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales** with the following constraints:
    - **Perception Cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated **continuously** (frequency unspecified but aligned with sensor refresh rates, e.g., LiDAR/camera frame rates).
    - **Control Loop**: ACC commands are computed and transmitted with **≤100 ms latency** (per **R7**), ensuring synchronization with the PT’s physical dynamics.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices must maintain **≤100 ms clock accuracy** (**R8**) for event ordering and data integrity, achieved via hardware limitations (no specific protocol mentioned).
    The DT’s **simulator components** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing) operate at **higher fidelity** but are decoupled from the real-time control loop."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** adapted from **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensing** (LiDAR/camera) and **actuation** (motor/steering) components, plus **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE** (unique to this use case).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Centralizes **data collection**, **ACC control logic**, and **reporting**, deployed on external hardware (e.g., cloud/edge) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Provides **human-machine interfaces** (3D Visualization + Control Panel) for operators and developers.
    - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures interoperability between entities via **ROS2** (intra-vehicle) and **Wi-Fi/UDP** (inter-entity).
    The constellation deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) and splitting the **User Interface FE** into sub-components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages:
    - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD-like visualizations** and **simulator components** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing).
    - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system health monitoring via DTs as referenced in related work). The DT acts as a **product lifecycle management tool**, supporting **digital threads** for end-to-end information flow.
    - **Representation Phase**: The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization of **ego vehicle state**, **object tracks**, and **control commands**. No explicit mention of **as-designed (ideal)** or **as-manufactured** representations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
    - **Real-Time Synchronization**: ≤100 ms latency (**R7**) and clock accuracy (**R8**) ensure temporal fidelity for control loops.
    - **Sensor Fusion**: **DBSCAN clustering** and **Kalman filtering** improve object track accuracy in noisy LiDAR/camera data.
    - **Validation Mechanisms**:
      - **ACC Compliance**: Implements **ISO 15622 Performance Class I** for basic ACC functionality.
      - **User Feedback**: Transparent **3D Visualization UI** (showing object tracks and driving path) enhances trust in ADAS decisions (**R4**).
    - **Uncertainty Handling**: No explicit mention of uncertainty quantification, but **Kalman filters** inherently model sensor noise.
    - **Verification**: Achieved via **ROS2 node lifecycle management** and **real-world testing** (e.g., teleoperated vehicle experiments)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi/UDP** for inter-entity communication (DT ↔ PT) with **≤100 ms latency** (**R7**).
    - **Intra-Vehicle Communication**: **ROS2** for message passing between **ROS2 nodes** (e.g., sensor data → Data Pre-Processing FE).
    - **Data Translation**: Custom **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment (e.g., converting LiDAR point clouds to object tracks).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **≤100 ms accuracy** (**R8**) via hardware constraints (no specific protocol like NTP/PTP mentioned)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across:
    - **Physical Twin (PT)**: **Jetson Orin Nano** (hosts **Physical Twin Entity** components: Data Pre-Processing FE, Actuation FE, Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE).
    - **External Hardware**: Cloud/edge server (hosts **Digital Twin Entity**: Data Collection FE, ACC Controlling FE, Reporting FE, Data Storage).
    - **UI Device**: Separate workstation (hosts **User Entity**: 3D Visualization, Control Panel).
    The **ROS2 middleware** enables modular deployment, while **Wi-Fi/UDP** connects entities with ≤100 ms latency."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
    - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework** (Part 2), adapted for automotive use by mapping software components to **Functional Entities (FEs)** (e.g., Data Collecting FE, Controlling FE).
    - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance**, implemented as **Performance Class I** (basic ACC functionality).
    - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Specifies **≤100 ms latency** for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication, adopted for DT ↔ PT synchronization (**R7**).
    - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular robotics/automotive software systems.
    Deviations from ISO 23247 include the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) and **split User Interface FE**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Real-Time Constraints**: ≤100 ms latency (**R7**) and clock synchronization (**R8**) ensure **safety-critical operation** (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **Remote Operation**: The DT enables **remote management** of ACC (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking), which could pose risks if compromised. However, no explicit security mechanisms (e.g., encryption, authentication) are mentioned.
    - **Safety Assurance**: Achieved via **hardware constraints** (e.g., Jetson Orin Nano’s real-time capabilities) and **ROS2 middleware** for deterministic communication.
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The system falls under the **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** taxonomy (per David and Bork), allowing operators to override automated decisions."
]
